summary: Iteration 60: Backend Prerender Service & District FAQ Tests - All 20 tests PASSED. Backend prerender endpoints return valid HTML with correct meta tags and JSON-LD schemas. District pages have FAQ section with 4 expandable questions and FAQPage schema. Cookie consent and admin login verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prerender service fully functional. District pages have FAQ section with data-testid='district-faq' and items 'district-faq-0' through 'district-faq-3'. All JSON-LD schemas (MedicalBusiness, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage) present in district pages.

prerender_product_mboss.details: Returns 200 with valid HTML, title contains 'MBOSS Screw System', has Product JSON-LD schema

prerender_catalog.details: Returns 200 with HTML listing all divisions

prerender_district_hyderabad.details: Returns 200 with district content and MedicalBusiness schema

district_page_faq_section.details: FAQ section visible with data-testid='district-faq', contains 4 questions

district_page_faq_expandable.details: FAQ items use details/summary elements, expand on click

district_page_schemas.details: All 3 required schemas present: MedicalBusiness, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage

district_faq_schema_questions.details: FAQPage schema contains 4 questions matching UI

warangal_district_faq.details: Warangal district page has FAQ section and correct title

cookie_consent_banner.details: Banner appears on first visit, Accept All works, localStorage set correctly

admin_login.details: Login works with password AgileHealth2026admin, redirects to dashboard

prerender_verification.html_structure: Valid HTML5 with head/body, meta tags, JSON-LD scripts
